head_commit.message:
Rename crate axplat-aarch64-peripherals to axplat-arm-peripherals (#44)

* [chore] update dependencies

percpu 0.2.0 -> 0.3.1
page_table_multiarch 0.5.5 -> 0.6.1
axcpu 0.2.0 -> 0.3.0

* [refactor] rename axplat-aarch64-peripherals to axplat-arm-peripherals
